name: PayrollStream

methods.name: create
methods.desc:
Initialize contract with salary ASA.
Stores the deployer as employer, links the salary token, and initializes all counters to zero.

methods.name: opt_in_asset
methods.desc:
Opt the contract into the salary ASA.
Must be called by the employer after creation. Executes an inner AssetTransfer of 0 to self, which is the opt-in mechanism.

methods.name: fund

args.name: axfer
args.desc: The preceding AssetTransfer transaction in the group.

methods.desc:
Validate a preceding asset transfer that funds the contract.
The actual token transfer happens in the preceding transaction within the atomic group. This method validates that the transfer is correct.

methods.name: register_employee

args.name: rate
args.desc: Hourly salary rate in base units (e.g., 100_000_000 = 100 PAYUSD/hr).

methods.desc:
Register a new employee with an hourly salary rate.
The employee must have already opted into the application via opt_in(). Sets all local state fields and starts the streaming clock.

methods.name: withdraw

returns.desc: The amount of tokens sent to the employee.

methods.desc:
Withdraw all accrued salary tokens.
Calculates the amount owed based on elapsed time and salary rate, then sends tokens via inner AssetTransfer. Includes overdraft protection: if the contract balance is insufficient, sends the available balance and pauses the stream.

methods.name: get_accrued

returns.desc: The accrued token amount in base units (0 if inactive).

methods.desc: Read-only: view the accrued (unclaimed) balance for an employee.

methods.name: update_rate

args.name: new_rate
args.desc: New hourly salary rate in base units.

methods.desc:
Update an employee's hourly salary rate.
Settles all accrued salary at the old rate first, then applies the new rate going forward.

methods.name: pause_stream
methods.desc:
Pause an individual employee's salary stream.
Settles all accrued salary first, then deactivates the stream. No further accrual until resume_stream is called.

methods.name: resume_stream
methods.desc:
Resume a paused employee's salary stream.
Resets the streaming clock to now. No retroactive accrual for the paused period. No settlement or inner transaction.

methods.name: remove_employee
methods.desc:
Remove an employee with final payout.
Settles any accrued salary, clears all local state, and decrements the employee count.

methods.name: milestone_pay

args.name: amount
args.desc: Token amount to send in base units.

methods.desc:
Send a one-time milestone payment to an employee.
Does not affect the employee's streaming rate or timestamps. Simply transfers the specified amount from the contract pool.

methods.name: pause_all
methods.desc:
Emergency pause all active streams.
Sets the global is_paused flag to 1. All withdraw() calls will be rejected. Individual employee states are NOT modified — no settlements are triggered.

desc:
Decentralized payroll streaming contract.

    Employers register employees with hourly salary rates. The contract
    mathematically computes accrued salary based on elapsed time, and
    employees withdraw on demand via inner asset transfers.

sourceInfo.errorMessage: Only employer can opt in asset
